sections.name: Section 1
sections.content_preview: You've been doing this for years. Years of appointments, therapies, schedules. Years of people who mean well but don't fully understand what your days look like.

sections.name: Section 2
sections.content_preview: The parent who nods when you say "he's never given me a signal in 8 years", not because she read about it, but because she lived it. The mom who doesn't try to offer advice, just sits beside you in th
